atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining and overriding design tokens such as colors, spacing, fonts, and more directly in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining custom utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for specifying content sources for class detection.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for organizing styles into base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for inlining utility classes into custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for specifying a configuration file to use.
